# Stagehand v4 import provenance

Imported from browserbase/v4-spike @ main (cc303bc, frozen 2026-07-23) via git-filter-repo.
Paths rewritten on import: packages/server -> packages/extension, packages/docs -> packages/docs-v4.
Root config (workspace, catalog, CI, tsconfig) deliberately NOT imported; reconciled in follow-up commits.

Path renames change every tree hash, so imported commits have new SHAs.
Map below resolves any v4-spike SHA to its counterpart here (old -> new):
